title: Intensely Roasted Filipino Chicken Tinola
description: A roasted and flaky Filipino dish made with chicken, malai, and spices, perfect for meal prep. This low-glycemic-friendly recipe is served in a tinola form on a wooden board.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together malai, fish sauce, lime juice, and black pepper.
Add the chicken thighs to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and place on a wooden board.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for 35 minutes.
While the chicken is roasting, saute the onion, garlic, and ginger in a pan until softened.
After the chicken has roasted for 25 minutes, brush the sauteed onion mixture on top of the chicken.
Continue roasting the chicken for an additional 10 minutes.
Let the chicken rest for 10 minutes before serving.
